about.paragraph1: I'm a Full Stack Developer with 5 years of experience, specialized in e-commerce with Magento 2 / Adobe Commerce and modern front-end development with React and TypeScript.
about.paragraph2: I have solid experience building custom modules, payment API integrations, and performance optimizations. On the front-end, I craft responsive, accessible interfaces focused on user experience.

items.title: Custom Magento Store
items.description: Full e-commerce store built with Magento 2, including custom modules, payment gateway integrations, and performance optimizations.
items.imageAlt: Screenshot of the Custom Magento Store

items.title: React Dashboard
items.description: Modern admin dashboard built with React and TypeScript, featuring interactive charts, authentication, and REST API integration.
